events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Need assess: residential job, flashing & WRB integration, window pan flashing absent. At rough-complete. Need determine compliance with IRC R703 and mfr instructions. Window pan flashing is required at sills typically to direct water out; absence is a defect and non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Water intrusion potential critical? Residential; absent pan flashing can cause water intrusion, rot, structural damage. Risk high. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent_complete maybe 80? Value 0. Confidence 1.0. Findings: window pan flashing missing at window rough opening; vulnerable to water intrusion. Actions: remove/install pan flashing per manufacturer and IRC R703, integrate with WRB, inspect before closing. Rationale: IRC R703 and mfr require flashing to prevent water entry; absence violates. References: IRC R703, mfr instructions. Include all fields. Need valid JSON exactly.
